overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a covered urban street in Night City during golden hour. The player moves steadily forward past pedestrians, vending machines, and vehicles while warm sunlight streams through the overhead concrete beam structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with arcade machines and vehicle lane

events.description: passing a pedestrian in brown coat who temporarily blocks the forward view
slight acceleration while navigating past the arcade machine area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway, glancing at illuminated arcade machines on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat and pink shoes walking toward the camera

entered.detail: overhead concrete and metal beam structure with skylights creating striped shadows
tall brutalist concrete wall with horizontal lines and neon blue accent lighting
illuminated arcade cabinet with colorful 'BIG' text display
wooden-style barriers with red trim separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle road
futuristic vehicles parked along the right side of the covered street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban walkway with dramatic golden hour light streaming through overhead beams. The player walks forward past an illuminated arcade machine on the left and yellow guardrails on the right, approaching a pedestrian in a brown coat. The concrete brutalist architecture creates a distinct cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street with active vehicle traffic lane

events.description: green sports car and black sedan drive past on the right side road

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the walkway as vehicles pass by on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving along the multi-lane road parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: cars driving along the road including a distinctive green sports car

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the mid-section of the covered walkway where the road on the right becomes more active with moving traffic. A green sports car drives past, and the overhead beam structure appears closer as the player advances. The arcade machine fades behind as the scene opens slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching commercial medical district

events.description: passing a group of two pedestrians walking side by side in the opposite direction
medical clinic sign with green neon cross becomes visible on the left wall

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic while approaching the medical clinic area

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking side by side toward the camera, one in dark clothing

entered.detail: green neon cross sign indicating medical facility entrance ahead
debris and garbage bags accumulated against the concrete wall
illuminated commercial signage including red neon text

segments.scene_description: The player encounters more pedestrian traffic while approaching a commercial area. Trash piles appear on the left against the concrete wall, and a green neon medical cross sign becomes visible in the distance. The vehicle traffic fades as the walkway continues deeper into the covered district.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with medical clinic entrance and vending machines

events.description: slight left turn toward the medical clinic entrance while passing vending machines

agents.ego_description: turning slightly left toward the medical clinic while passing brightly colored vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple shirt walking away from camera toward the clinic

entered.detail: bright red automated vending machine with illuminated display
green automated vending machine adjacent to the medical clinic entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the medical clinic entrance, with the green cross sign now prominent on the left. The player passes red and green vending machines while turning slightly left. The yellow guardrails and vehicles exit the frame as the walkway continues toward the clinic entrance under the covered structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a brutalist urban walkway that transitions from a quiet, sun-drenched corridor into a bustling commercial district. It begins under a concrete beam structure where dramatic golden hour light streams across an illuminated arcade machine and yellow guardrails. As the camera advances, the scene opens up to reveal active traffic, including a green sports car speeding past on the adjacent road. The environment then shifts toward a more cluttered urban aesthetic as trash piles appear against the concrete walls and a green neon medical cross emerges in the distance. Finally, the camera passes a row of red and green vending machines, turning slightly left to approach the entrance of the medical clinic.
